title: Looking for Financial Analyst at IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Noida location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies:
IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
